screen.spotter.config.title: Ping Mod Settings
screen.spotter.config.section.label: Label Lines
screen.spotter.config.show_beam.tooltip: Show the 2D line connecting the label down to the pinged spot.
Where the rotating block/item hologram sits relative to the label.
screen.spotter.config.show_target_name.t: Show the line with the pinged block or entity name (e.g. 'Grass Block').
screen.spotter.config.show_owner_name.to: Show the line with the name of the player who placed the ping.
screen.spotter.config.show_player_head.t: Show the pinger's skin face icon next to their name.
screen.spotter.config.show_distance.tool: Show the line with the distance to the pinged spot (e.g. '5m').
screen.spotter.config.show_hostile_indic: Show a red border around the hologram panel when the pinged entity is hostile.
